title: EaseonSS - PumpkinCarver
description:
Hold shears or an axe in one hand and a pumpkin in the other to carve it instantly.
You can also carve placed pumpkins with an axe, just like using shears in vanilla.
body:
## 🌿 Easeon – Pumpkin Carver **This mod requires EaseonSS-Core** ## Overview **Pumpkin Carver** is a lightweight Fabric mod that enhances pumpkin carving in Minecraft. Hold shears or an axe in one hand and a pumpkin in the other, then right-click to carve it instantly. You can also carve placed pumpkins by right-clicking them with an axe, just like using shears in vanilla Minecraft.
Preview ![showcase](https://github.com/EaseonKit/EaseonSS-PumpkinCarver/raw/main/showcase.webp?raw=true)

## Commands All commands require OP level 2 permission. | Command | Description | | -------------------------------- | -------------------- | | /easeon pumpkincarver | View current status | | /easeon pumpkincarver | Enable/disable |
Configuration ```json { "enabled": true, "requiredOpLevel": 2 // Requires a server restart to take effect. } ``` `config/easeon/easeon.ss.pumpkincarver.json`

--- ### 🔗 More Easeon Mods Looking for more lightweight and practical mods in the same style? Check out other Easeon series mods here.
